description: arXiv:2607.18883v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: A central aim of unsupervised learning is to uncover latent factors that explain dependencies among observations. Probabilistic models typically achieve this by introducing multiple latent variables linked through a graph of conditional relationships, with distributional parameters and their dependence learnt from data. Learning relies either on...
author: Lior Fox, Kai Biegun, James Heald, Samo Hromadka, Arielle Rosinski, Maneesh Sahani
